$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Candidate FFET catalog after exact-file audit additions.
$metadata.title: Phase 6.5 Composer Resolved Candidate FFET Catalog v2

additions_from_exact_file_audit.title: Composer API module mount and route spine
additions_from_exact_file_audit.mcr: Composer API module mounts once and exposes an activation-aware route spine without wiring individual features multiple times.
additions_from_exact_file_audit.split_rationale: Exact-file audit discovered shared API mount files; a dedicated FFET prevents overlap across runtime feature tickets.
additions_from_exact_file_audit.source_claim_note: Derived from exact-file ownership audit and requirement that Composer integrate with existing runtime substrate.

additions_from_exact_file_audit.title: Composer frontend navigation and activation mount
additions_from_exact_file_audit.mcr: Composer navigation appears only when activated and routes to the approved Composer shell without bypassing screen contracts.
additions_from_exact_file_audit.split_rationale: Exact-file audit discovered shared frontend navigation/config files; a dedicated FFET prevents overlap across UI surface tickets.
additions_from_exact_file_audit.source_claim_note: Derived from exact-file ownership audit and frontend activation requirement.

candidates.title: Import and metadata normalization
candidates.mcr: Imported Composer docs have compliant metadata, current source references, and no stale authority citations.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Suite amendment and ratification packet
candidates.mcr: Suite amendment package names exact doctrine patches and remains unsigned until human ratification.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: P-40 through P-45 parameter amendment
candidates.mcr: Composer governed parameters use P-40 through P-45 and never reuse P-26 through P-39.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Source authority and conflict register
candidates.mcr: Every Composer claim has authority tier and conflict disposition path.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Phase sequence and 6D dependency gate
candidates.mcr: Phase 6.5 is inserted before 6D and 6D dependency gates are explicit.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Gate controls and FFET lifecycle
candidates.mcr: Execution flags remain false and human Gate 3 approval boundary is explicit.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Composition and CompositionVersion contracts
candidates.mcr: contracts:validate proves composition/version schemas and published immutability.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Universal change proposal contract

candidates.title: One change pipeline runtime
candidates.mcr: Runtime tests prove every configuration face writes through one pipeline.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Deterministic risk-floor classifier
candidates.mcr: Tests prove risk floors cannot be lowered by AI or humans.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Human preview before consequence
candidates.mcr: Consequential changes require human-readable preview before publish.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.
candidates.source_claim_note: Derived from management-approved subphase scope and adjacent claim cluster; must be rechecked during exact-file ownership mapping.

candidates.title: Versioned change graph and provenance
candidates.mcr: Accepted proposals produce replayable version graph and provenance evidence.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Super Admin support face pipeline bound
candidates.mcr: Support surface cannot write config outside one change pipeline.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Primitive contract and manifest baseline
candidates.mcr: Every primitive declares capabilities, inputs, outputs, permissions, events, cost, evidence, and failure modes.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Primitive compatibility validation
candidates.mcr: Incompatible primitive chains are rejected with explainable errors.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Extension registration gate
candidates.mcr: Only approved extension path can register executable primitive behavior.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Runtime resolver source chain
candidates.mcr: Resolver applies deterministic source layers and conflict reporting.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.
candidates.source_claim_note: Derived from management-approved subphase scope and adjacent claim cluster; must be rechecked during exact-file ownership mapping.

candidates.title: Symbolic reference boundary
candidates.mcr: Exports and compositions use symbolic references, never raw secrets or tenant/user IDs.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Primitive deprecation lifecycle
candidates.mcr: Deprecated primitives block new compositions without breaking existing valid versions.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Primitive registry negative demo
candidates.mcr: Demo rejects unregistered, missing, deprecated, and incompatible primitive paths before publish.

candidates.title: Organization graph authoring
candidates.mcr: Tests prove P-40 depth, multi-parent precedence, and reorganization validation.

candidates.title: Workflow graph authoring
candidates.mcr: Tests prove P-41/P-42 workflow and stage limits plus bounded-loop validation.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Custom fields with primitive inheritance
candidates.mcr: Unsafe custom fields affecting money, identity, reputation, or permission are blocked unless primitive-supported.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Permission composition authoring
candidates.mcr: Permission changes compose through Access Core/Gatekeeper and in-flight behavior is explicit.

candidates.title: Template library authoring
candidates.mcr: Templates enter the change pipeline as proposals and never bypass validation.

candidates.title: Concurrent editing conflict resolution
candidates.mcr: Concurrent edits detect conflicts and block publish until resolved.

candidates.title: Manual AI template import parity

candidates.title: Delegation grant contract

candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Delegation lifecycle state machine
candidates.mcr: Lifecycle tests cover grant, accept, reject, revoke, and replacement.

candidates.title: Tier drop abandonment fallback
candidates.mcr: Tier drop pauses invalid stages and abandonment routes to declared fallback with evidence.

candidates.title: Onward delegation Gatekeeper enforcement
candidates.mcr: Onward delegation without host consent is denied and audited.

candidates.title: Structured agreement acceptance
candidates.mcr: Agreement draft and binding acceptance are distinct and identity-tier gated.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Evidence crossing and lenses
candidates.mcr: Evidence crossing writes one event with authorized lenses only.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Reputation protection boundary
candidates.mcr: Prohibited reputation inference is blocked and audited.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.
candidates.source_claim_note: Derived from management-approved subphase scope and adjacent claim cluster; must be rechecked during exact-file ownership mapping.

candidates.title: Dispute and review scaffolding
candidates.mcr: Dispute path exists for contested delegation, agreement, refund, and reversal without inventing legal outcome.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: Sub-tenant invite guard
candidates.mcr: Sub-tenant external invites require explicit host grant and audit.

candidates.title: Escrow composition contract
candidates.mcr: Composer escrow composes existing 6B primitives and does not create payout rails.

candidates.title: Split tax refund reversal rules
candidates.mcr: Split rules support tax/refund/reversal and no split percentage is a default.

candidates.title: Payout rail reference boundary
candidates.mcr: Composer references existing payout adapters and does not build new rails.

candidates.title: Budget and cost honesty
candidates.mcr: Cost forecast and P-45 warning/block behavior are visible before publish.
candidates.split_rationale: Natural boundary: owns one coherent capability with one validation ladder and no overlapping ownership.

candidates.title: External action registration contract
candidates.mcr: External action contract declares provider, timeout, retry, idempotency, and fallback.

candidates.title: Credential boundary runtime
candidates.mcr: Raw credentials are rejected in compositions and exports.

candidates.title: Provider failure recovery
candidates.mcr: Provider failures create audit evidence and user-visible recovery.

candidates.title: AI external action guard
candidates.mcr: AI may propose but never execute external actions.

candidates.title: Money and external-action negative demo
candidates.mcr: Demo proves failed payment, missing credentials, provider unavailable, and AI execution denial.

candidates.title: Validation engine severities

candidates.title: Composer API module mount and route spine
candidates.mcr: Composer API module mounts once and exposes an activation-aware route spine without wiring individual features multiple times.
candidates.split_rationale: Exact-file audit discovered shared API mount files; a dedicated FFET prevents overlap across runtime feature tickets.

candidates.title: Composer frontend navigation and activation mount
candidates.mcr: Composer navigation appears only when activated and routes to the approved Composer shell without bypassing screen contracts.
